overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a historical action game (Assassin's Creed Unity) set in Revolutionary-era Paris. The player character, dressed in 18th-century clothing, walks through autumn streets with fallen leaves, descends to a riverside dock to explore the waterfront, then returns to street level through a bustling market area.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city street with pedestrians and carriage traffic

events.description: player character walks past the horse-drawn carriage on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a busy street, passing pedestrians in period clothing and a stationary carriage

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage stationary on the side of the street

entered.detail: tall stone buildings with arched windows lining the street
dark wooden carriage with red upholstery and large wheels
ground covered with brown autumn leaves and dirt
black iron lamp posts along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a historic city street lined with stone buildings. The ground is covered in autumn leaves. A horse-drawn carriage is parked on the right side, and various NPCs in 18th-century clothing walk about.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside promenade approach with sandbag fortifications

events.description: emerging from enclosed street into open waterfront area with view of river

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the waterfront, passing sandbag barricades and wooden market stalls

entered.detail: white canvas sandbags stacked in rows along the right side
wooden tables with goods and canvas awnings
greenish river water visible in the distance between buildings

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the character approaches the waterfront. Sandbag barricades line the right side, and market stalls are visible. The river becomes visible in the distance, and the sky is fully visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase descending to river dock level

events.description: character begins descending steep stone stairs toward the river dock

agents.ego_description: walking down a steep stone staircase flanked by high stone walls toward the dock level

notable_agents.action: man in tricorn hat standing at the top of the stairs observing

entered.detail: wide worn stone steps descending between high walls
tall dark stone wall rising on the left side

segments.scene_description: The character descends a narrow stone staircase between high walls. The lighting becomes shadowed and diffused. The river is visible to the right as the character moves downward toward the dock level.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden river dock with cargo and fishing equipment

events.description: reaching the bottom of stairs and stepping onto wooden dock platform
character stops and looks around at the river and bridge view
character turns and begins walking back along the dock toward the stairs

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden dock, pausing to look at the river and historic buildings across the water, then turning to walk back

notable_agents.action: man sitting on the dock edge fishing or mending nets

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the walkway along the water
large classical stone building with columns and mansard roof across the river
multi-arched stone bridge spanning the river with statues
wooden barrels and crates stacked on the dock
tall stone wall rising from the water supporting the upper city

segments.scene_description: The character explores a wooden dock at river level. Across the water stands a grand historic palace and a stone bridge. Cargo barrels and fishing equipment are scattered on the dock. The character walks to the end, looks around, then turns back.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase ascending from dock to street level

events.description: character begins ascending the stone stairs back to street level

agents.ego_description: walking back up the steep stone staircase away from the river

entered.detail: same stone staircase now being ascended

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stone staircase back toward the upper city level. The stone walls enclose the space, and the river view fades behind. Other pedestrians are seen descending as the character goes up.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air market street with vendor stalls and tree-lined promenade

events.description: exiting stairwell into bustling market area with wooden vendor stalls
passing through stone archway into tree-lined promenade section

agents.ego_description: walking through a busy market courtyard with vendors and shoppers, then continuing along a tree-lined cobblestone path

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind a wooden table arranging goods

entered.detail: wooden tables and stalls with various goods and produce
row of young trees lining the path
decorative stone gate with ironwork between market and promenade

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a bustling open-air market with wooden stalls and vendors. The ground transitions to cobblestone. After passing through a stone archway, the scene becomes a tree-lined promenade with scattered market carts and pedestrians in period clothing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a leaf-strewn city street down to a riverside dock and back up into a bustling urban market. It begins by following a character through a historic district lined with stone buildings and horse-drawn carriages before the view opens up toward the waterfront, where sandbag barricades and market stalls appear. The scene then shifts as the camera descends a narrow, shadowed stone staircase, leaving the open sky behind to reach a wooden dock scattered with cargo barrels and fishing gear beneath the gaze of a grand palace and stone bridge. After a brief exploration of the waterfront, the camera ascends the stairs once more, moving away from the river and back into the diffused light of the upper city. Finally, the character emerges through a stone archway into a vibrant open-air market, where the terrain transitions to cobblestones and a tree-lined promenade filled with period pedestrians.
